states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_behind(), False)
states.description: Move to open space 4 meters behind teammate to receive ball

states.name: Shoot('goal')
states.description: Opportunity to shoot directly, taking the shot

states.name: Pass('teammate')
states.description: No clear shot, passing back to teammate at distance 4 meters

states.name: MoveToBallAndGetPossession()
states.description: Move to ball and get possession from teammate's return pass

states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_infront_space(), False)
states.description: Move to open space 5 meters in front of teammate after receiving ball

states.name: StopAndReceiveBall()
states.description: Receive the ball for final attack

transitions.description: Wait to receive a pass from teammate before moving to ball
Wait until you have ball possession before acting Opportunity to shoot directly, taking the shot
Wait until you have ball possession before acting No clear shot, passing back to teammate at distance 4 meters
Wait to receive a return pass from teammate
Move to ball and get possession from teammate's return pass Move to open space 5 meters in front of teammate after receiving ball
Wait to receive the ball in advanced position
Wait for possession and to be in shooting range (< 14m from goal) Shoot at the goal now
